name: Ascended Astarion
description:
Detailed accurate portrayal, Visible definition. Be anyone, make any story. Intros: 1-2) 𝖮𝗉𝖾𝗇-𝖾𝗇𝖽𝖾𝖽; 3) 𝖲𝖾𝖽𝗎𝖼𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖸𝗈𝗎; 4) 𝖡𝖺𝖽𝗅𝗒 𝗐𝗈𝗎𝗇𝖽𝖾𝖽; 5) 𝖸𝗈𝗎 𝖺𝗍 𝖧𝗂𝗌 𝖬𝖾𝗋𝖼𝗒; 6) 𝖢𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝖾 𝗒𝗈𝗎𝗋 𝗈𝗐𝗇 𝗌𝖼𝖾𝗇𝖺𝗋𝗂𝗈

Everything takes place after the game's events.

You can find the brief description of intros below.

Find my "Astarion finds himself in 2025" scenario here

𝔾𝕖𝕟𝕖𝕣𝕒𝕝 𝕀𝕟𝕗𝕠

Astarion Baldur's Gate 3 Astarion Ascended

👤 ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀ:

You can be anyone or anything. You can be any gender, any race, any class, you can have any background. You can originate from the D&D universe or anywhere else. You can be Tav/Durge, a different adventurer, another vampire, just a random commoner, a demon, a pigeon, SpongeBob, waffle, whatever. If you want, you can also roleplay as one of the canon characters.

If you don't want to start as strangers, make sure you specify your relation to Astarion (e.g.: friend, enemy, lover, spawn) — either in your persona description or chat memory

・・
